theme_archetype.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
theme_archetype.description: Professional & Corporate (Navy Blue, Gray, White) with Clear & Modern accents (Electric Blue). Communicates authority, modern engineering, and cutting-edge tech.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid strategy for services. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8

ui_components_strategy.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-[#E2E8F0]. Must have z-50.
ui_components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] transition-colors. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0A1128] text-[#0A1128] hover:bg-[#0A1128] hover:text-white.
ui_components_strategy.cards: Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px border (#E2E8F0), no default shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow.
ui_components_strategy.footer: Dark Theme Footer: bg-[#0A1128] text-white py-20. Massive space, high contrast.

accueil.hero: Impressionnante avec animation (Framer Motion). Dark navy background overlay on abstract tech image, huge typography, electric blue CTA.
accueil.services_overview: Bento grid of 4-6 key services with icons.
accueil.chiffres_cles: Large typography numbers (e.g., '10+ Années', '500+ Projets') over a light gray surface.
accueil.cta: Section with Electric Blue background, white text, driving to Contact.

services.layout: Detailed grid of all services (BTP, Domotique, Surveillance, Décoration, Réseaux, Data Center, Télécom, Fibre, Apps Mobile/Web) with Lucide-react icons and short descriptions.

a_propos.layout: Storytelling layout. Image on left, text on right. Team section, valeurs, and key metrics.

contact.layout: Split layout: Contact form on one side, contact details and map placeholder on the other.

realisations.layout: Elegant static placeholder. 'En construction' or 'Bientôt disponible' with a sleek modern aesthetic.

images.description: Deep blue abstract technology background for hero section
Modern smart building architecture for BTP / Construction service
Modern server room for Data Center / Network service
Glowing blue fiber optic cables for Telecom & Fiber service

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).
testing_and_accessibility.contrast_ratio: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for normal text. Use white text on Navy Blue and Electric Blue backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `lucide-react` for icons if not already present.
Use standard HTML+Tailwind for main marketing layouts.
Ensure all text is in French as requested.
Use the provided image URLs strictly.
For the logo, use textual design styling: e.g., JeufJeulTECH.
Create the requested pages using React Router.
